description: User clicks the zoom in button on the map
frame_description: The user is interacting with the map view on the Hostelworld search results page for London.

description: User clicks the zoom in button on the map again
frame_description: The user continues to zoom into the map.

description: User clicks the zoom in button on the map a third time
frame_description: The user zooms in further to see more detail on the map.

description: User pans the map to explore different areas of London
frame_description: After zooming in, the user drags the map to view different hostel locations across London.
